name: 箍の外れたビスクドール
slug: 箍の外れたビスクドール
short_description: Now, taste the infinite despair! People in a town suddenly turn violent due to unexplained symptoms. This is a story about enjoying the bad endings that befall high school students.
detailed_description:
It is a visual novel that enjoys several bad endings.

It depicts the horror of the protagonist who is on the run from people who have gone berserk.

A friend who was close to her just a moment ago becomes a vicious serial killer, just like in a horror movie, and attacks her.

A creepy girl takes other people by the hand without hesitation.

It is hard to tell who is friend and who is foe.

An incredible tension and fear will strike you.

The game is currently only available as a “prologue,” and the ending is a bad one, but it is a complete story.

This game is a game to enjoy the cruel and unpleasant bad endings.

We plan to add several new stories in additional episodes in the future, most of which will have bad endings.
